ddls:
CREATE TABLE "specimens" (
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specimen record */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date when the specimens were collected */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable recorded (e.g., specimens collected, specimens pending for testing) */,
  "national_total" INTEGER /* Total number of specimens collected nationally */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county where the specimen was collected */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method of specimen collection (e.g., nasopharyngeal swab, blood sample) */,
  "specimen_type" TEXT /* Type of specimen collected (e.g., viral, bacterial) */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test performed on the specimen (e.g., PCR, serology) */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specimen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable recorded (e.g., specimens collected, total specimens tested) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the variable (e.g., count, percentage) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the variable (e.g., integer, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report content */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data analyst, public health officer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specimen being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was issued */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the notification (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specimen being assessed */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality assessment */,
  "score" REAL /* Quality score of the specimen data (e.g., 0 to 100) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the quality assessment */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard that the visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, map) */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specimen being visualized */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable being visualized */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county being visualized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the external health system */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the integration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the integration was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interoperability" (
  "interoperability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interoperability configuration */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interoperability configuration was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interoperability_id")
)
